column1: # Open English reference wordlist — top 200 most frequent words.
# Source: derived from public-domain frequency data (Project Gutenberg +
# Wiktionary frequency lists, both CC-0 / public domain). This is a Phase 1
# approximation — Phase 2 will replace it with a proper open reference corpus
# (e.g. derived from OpenSubtitles or similar CC-licensed data).
# Use: loaded by the engine as a fallback reference when no reference corpus
